text:
AoTs3-3spens/21石 is the 8th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"AoTs3" is an abbreviation of "Attack on Titan Season 3". Since the Japanese word for 3 is "san" (abbreviated sa"), "sa-spens" is a homophone for "suspense". The Japanese rendition of the English word "two" is "tsū" (abbreviated "tsu"), 1 in Japanese is "ichi" (abbreviated "i"), and 石 (stone) is "seki", which altogether becomes "tsu-i-seki" a homophone for "tsuiseki", Japanese for "pursuit".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first (0:00-2:34) has strong metallic percussion and electronic bursts, while the second (2:34-6:29) features different marching drums and percussion.
